However, directly applying such paradigms to Diffusion Large Language Models (dLLMs) is fundamentally hindered by the intractability of exact likelihood computation, which forces existing methods to rely on high-variance approximations. To bridge this gap, we propose Likelihood-Free Policy Optimization (LFPO), a native framework that maps the concept of vector field flow matching to the discrete token space. Specifically, LFPO formulates alignment as geometric velocity rectification, which directly optimizes denoising logits via contrastive updates. This design effectively bypasses the errors inherent in likelihood approximation, yielding the precise gradient estimation. Furthermore, LFPO enforce consistency by predicting final solutions from intermediate steps, effectively straightening the probability flow to enable high-quality generation with significantly fewer iterations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that LFPO not only outperforms state-of-the-art baselines on code and reasoning benchmarks but also accelerates inference by approximately 20% through reduced diffusion steps.
title_zh: LFPO：用于掩码扩散模型的无似然策略优化
abstract_zh: 基于可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）在提升自回归模型方面取得了显著成果，尤其在数学推理和代码生成等对正确性要求较高的领域表现突出。然而，将此类方法直接应用于扩散型大语言模型（dLLMs）时，由于精确似然计算的不可行性，现有方法被迫依赖高方差的近似手段，从而面临根本性障碍。为弥合这一差距，我们提出了无似然策略优化（LFPO），这是一种原生框架，将向量场流匹配的概念映射至离散的词元空间。具体而言，LFPO将对齐过程建模为几何速度校正，通过对比学习更新直接优化去噪 logits，从而有效规避了似然近似带来的固有误差，实现精确的梯度估计。此外，LFPO通过从中间步骤预测最终解来强制生成一致性，有效“拉直”概率流，显著减少迭代次数，实现高质量生成。大量实验表明，LFPO不仅在代码和推理基准上超越现有最先进方法，还通过减少扩散步数，将推理速度提升约20%。

title: RubricBench: Aligning Model-Generated Rubrics with Human Standards
authors: Qiyuan Zhang, Junyi Zhou, Yufei Wang, Fuyuan Lyu, Yidong Ming, Can Xu, Qingfeng Sun, Kai Zheng, Peng Kang, Xue Liu, Chen Ma
abstract: As Large Language Model (LLM) alignment evolves from simple completions to complex, highly sophisticated generation, Reward Models are increasingly shifting toward rubric-guided evaluation to mitigate surface-level biases. However, the community lacks a unified benchmark to assess this evaluation paradigm, as existing benchmarks lack both the discriminative complexity and the ground-truth rubric annotations required for rigorous analysis. To bridge this gap, we introduce RubricBench, a curated benchmark with 1,147 pairwise comparisons specifically designed to assess the reliability of rubric-based evaluation. Our construction employs a multi-dimensional filtration pipeline to target hard samples featuring nuanced input complexity and misleading surface bias, augmenting each with expert-annotated, atomic rubrics derived strictly from instructions. Comprehensive experiments reveal a substantial capability gap between human-annotated and model-generated rubrics, indicating that even state-of-the-art models struggle to autonomously specify valid evaluation criteria, lagging considerably behind human-guided performance.
title_zh: RubricBench：使模型生成的评分标准与人类标准对齐
abstract_zh: 随着大型语言模型（LLM）对齐技术从简单的文本补全演进到复杂且高度精细的生成任务，奖励模型正越来越多地转向基于评分量规（rubric）的评估方式，以缓解表面层面的偏见问题。然而，当前社区尚缺乏一个统一的基准来评估这一评估范式，因为现有基准既缺乏足够的区分复杂性，也缺少用于严谨分析的真值量规标注。为填补这一空白，我们提出了RubricBench——一个精心构建的基准，包含1,147组成对比较样本，专门用于评估基于量规的评估方法的可靠性。我们的构建过程采用多维度筛选流程，聚焦于那些具有细微输入复杂性和误导性表面偏见的高难度样本，并为每个样本配备由专家标注的、原子级别的量规，这些量规严格依据任务指令生成。全面的实验结果揭示了人工标注量规与模型自动生成量规之间存在显著的能力差距，表明即使是最先进的模型在自主确定有效评估标准方面仍面临困难，其表现远落后于人类指导下的评估水平。

title: Implementing Dependent Type Theory Inhabitation and Unification
authors: Chase Norman, Jeremy Avigad
abstract: Dependent type theory is the foundation of many modern proof assistants. Inhabitation and unification are undecidable problems that are useful for theorem proving and program synthesis. We introduce Canonical-min, a sound and complete solver for inhabitation and unification in dependent type theory, implemented in 185 lines of Lean code. This paper describes a novel implementation of dependent type theory and a monadic framework to transform the type checker into a performant solver. Finally, we introduce DTTBench, a benchmark for type inhabitation in dependent type theory.
title_zh: 实现依赖类型理论中的可满足性与合一
abstract_zh: 依赖类型理论是许多现代证明助手的基础。可满足性与合一问题是定理证明和程序综合中有用的不可判定问题。我们提出了 Canonical-min，一个在依赖类型理论中可满足性与合一问题上的 sound 且 complete 的求解器，仅用 185 行 Lean 代码实现。本文描述了一种依赖类型理论的新颖实现方式，以及一个单子框架，用于将类型检查器转化为高性能求解器。最后，我们提出了 DTTBench，一个用于依赖类型理论中类型可满足性问题的基准测试集。

title: PymooLab: An Open-Source Visual Analytics Framework for Multi-Objective Optimization using LLM-Based Code Generation and MCDM
authors: Thiago Santos, Sebastiao Xavier, Luiz Gustavo de Oliveira Carneiro, Gustavo de Souza
abstract: Multi-objective optimization is now a core paradigm in engineering design and scientific discovery. Yet mainstream evolutionary frameworks, including \textit{pymoo}, still depend on imperative coding for problem definition, algorithm configuration, and post-hoc analysis. That requirement creates a non-trivial barrier for practitioners without strong software-engineering training and often complicates reproducible experimentation. We address this gap through PymooLab, an open-source visual analytics environment built on top of \textit{pymoo}. The platform unifies configuration, execution monitoring, and formal decision support in a single reproducible workflow that automatically records hyperparameters, evaluation budgets, and random seeds. Its decoupled object-oriented architecture preserves compatibility with the base ecosystem while enabling LLM-assisted code generation for rapid model formulation. The interface also embeds interactive Multi-Criteria Decision Making (MCDM) tools, which reduces the cognitive burden of Pareto-front inspection. For computationally intensive studies, PymooLab relies on the native \textit{pymoo} acceleration pathway through JAX, improving scalability in high-dimensional evaluations. Overall, the framework combines visual experimentation, LLM-based modeling, and deterministic orchestration to narrow the gap between rigorous operations research and practical accessibility for domain experts. Source code is publicly available at https://github.com/METISBR/pymoolab.
title_zh: PymooLab：一个基于大语言模型代码生成与多准则决策方法的开源可视化分析框架，用于多目标优化
abstract_zh: 多目标优化如今已成为工程设计与科学发现中的核心范式。然而，主流的进化计算框架（如 \textit{pymoo}）在问题定义、算法配置和事后分析方面仍依赖于命令式编程，这为缺乏扎实软件工程背景的实践者设置了显著障碍，也常常导致实验难以复现。为此，我们提出了 PymooLab——一个基于 \textit{pymoo} 构建的开源可视化分析平台，旨在填补这一空白。该平台将配置、执行监控与形式化决策支持整合进一个可复现的工作流中，自动记录超参数、评估预算和随机种子等关键信息。其解耦的面向对象架构在保持与原生态系统的兼容性的同时，支持通过大语言模型（LLM）辅助生成代码，实现模型的快速构建。平台界面还集成了交互式多准则决策（MCDM）工具，显著降低了对帕累托前沿进行人工审视的认知负担。对于计算密集型研究，PymooLab 通过 JAX 原生加速路径，充分发挥 \textit{pymoo} 的性能优势，显著提升了高维评估场景下的可扩展性。总体而言，该框架融合了可视化实验、基于 LLM 的建模以及确定性编排，有效缩小了严谨运筹学方法与领域专家实际应用之间的鸿沟。项目源代码已公开，访问地址为 https://github.com/METISBR/pymoolab。

title: From Leaderboard to Deployment: Code Quality Challenges in AV Perception Repositories
authors: Mateus Karvat, Bram Adams, Sidney Givigi
abstract: Autonomous vehicle (AV) perception models are typically evaluated solely on benchmark performance metrics, with limited attention to code quality, production readiness and long-term maintainability. This creates a significant gap between research excellence and real-world deployment in safety-critical systems subject to international safety standards. To address this gap, we present the first large-scale empirical study of software quality in AV perception repositories, systematically analyzing 178 unique models from the KITTI and NuScenes 3D Object Detection leaderboards. Using static analysis tools (Pylint, Bandit, and Radon), we evaluated code errors, security vulnerabilities, maintainability, and development practices. Our findings revealed that only 7.3% of the studied repositories meet basic production-readiness criteria, defined as having zero critical errors and no high-severity security vulnerabilities. Security issues are highly concentrated, with the top five issues responsible for almost 80% of occurrences, which prompted us to develop a set of actionable guidelines to prevent them. Additionally, the adoption of Continuous Integration/Continuous Deployment pipelines was correlated with better code maintainability. Our findings highlight that leaderboard performance does not reflect production readiness and that targeted interventions could substantially improve the quality and safety of AV perception code.
title_zh: 从排行榜到部署：自动驾驶感知代码库中的代码质量挑战
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶（AV）感知模型通常仅根据基准性能指标进行评估，而对代码质量、生产就绪性以及长期可维护性的关注则十分有限。这种做法在安全关键系统中造成了研究卓越性与实际部署之间的显著差距，尤其是在需符合国际安全标准的场景下。为弥合这一差距，我们首次开展了大规模的实证研究，系统分析了来自KITTI和NuScenes 3D目标检测排行榜的178个独特AV感知模型的软件质量。通过使用静态分析工具（Pylint、Bandit和Radon），我们评估了代码错误、安全漏洞、可维护性及开发实践。研究发现，仅有7.3%的被研究代码库满足基本的生产就绪标准，即无关键错误且无高严重性安全漏洞。安全问题高度集中，前五类问题占所有问题的近80%，这促使我们制定了一套可操作的指导原则以预防此类问题。此外，采用持续集成/持续部署（CI/CD）流水线的项目表现出更好的代码可维护性。我们的研究结果表明，排行榜上的性能表现并不能反映代码的生产就绪性，而有针对性的干预措施可显著提升AV感知代码的质量与安全性。

title: Organizing, Orchestrating, and Benchmarking Agent Skills at Ecosystem Scale
authors: Hao Li, Chunjiang Mu, Jianhao Chen, Siyue Ren, Zhiyao Cui, Yiqun Zhang, Lei Bai, Shuyue Hu
abstract: The rapid proliferation of Claude agent skills has raised the central question of how to effectively leverage, manage, and scale the agent skill ecosystem. In this paper, we propose AgentSkillOS, the first principled framework for skill selection, orchestration, and ecosystem-level management. AgentSkillOS comprises two stages: (i) Manage Skills, which organizes skills into a capability tree via node-level recursive categorization for efficient discovery; and (ii) Solve Tasks, which retrieves, orchestrates, and executes multiple skills through DAG-based pipelines. To evaluate the agent's ability to invoke skills, we construct a benchmark of 30 artifact-rich tasks across five categories: data computation, document creation, motion video, visual design, and web interaction. We assess the quality of task outputs using LLM-based pairwise evaluation, and the results are aggregated via a Bradley-Terry model to produce unified quality scores. Experiments across three skill ecosystem scales (200 to 200K skills) show that tree-based retrieval effectively approximates oracle skill selection, and that DAG-based orchestration substantially outperforms native flat invocation even when given the identical skill set.Our findings confirm that structured composition is the key to unlocking skill potential. Our GitHub repository is available at:https://github.com/ynulihao/AgentSkillOS.
title_zh: 在生态系统层面组织、协调与基准测试代理技能
abstract_zh: Claude代理技能的迅速普及，引发了如何有效利用、管理与扩展代理技能生态系统的中心问题。本文提出AgentSkillOS，这是首个针对技能选择、编排与生态系统级管理的系统性框架。AgentSkillOS包含两个阶段：(i) 管理技能，通过节点级递归分类将技能组织成能力树，以实现高效发现；(ii) 解决任务，通过基于有向无环图（DAG）的流水线，检索、编排并执行多个技能。为评估代理调用技能的能力，我们构建了一个涵盖五个类别（数据计算、文档创建、运动视频、视觉设计和网络交互）的30个富含成果物的任务基准。我们采用基于大语言模型的成对评估方法衡量任务输出质量，并通过Bradley-Terry模型对结果进行聚合，生成统一的质量评分。在三个不同规模的技能生态系统（200至20万技能）上进行的实验表明，基于树结构的检索能有效逼近“理想”技能选择，而基于DAG的编排即使在使用相同技能集的情况下，也显著优于原生的扁平调用方式。我们的研究结果证实，结构化组合是释放技能潜力的关键。我们的GitHub代码仓库地址为：https://github.com/ynulihao/AgentSkillOS。

title: CharacterFlywheel: Scaling Iterative Improvement of Engaging and Steerable LLMs in Production
authors: Yixin Nie, Lin Guan, Zhongyao Ma, Anchit Gupta, Yipin Zhou, Xiao Li, Zhengping Zhou, Raymond Zeng, Gelin Zhou, Shigan Chu, Ajay Thampi, Wancen Mu, Nathan Shuster, Ketong Wang, Lin Chen, Jason Brewer, Derek Hao Hu, Alexander McCauley, Jason Weston, Sem Park, Na Zhang, Kevin Tang
abstract: This report presents CharacterFlywheel, an iterative flywheel process for improving large language models (LLMs) in production social chat applications across Instagram, WhatsApp, and Messenger. Starting from LLaMA 3.1, we refined models across 15 generations using data from both internal and external real-user traffic. Through continuous deployments from July 2024 to April 2025, we conducted controlled 7-day A/B tests showing consistent engagement improvements: 7 of 8 newly deployed models demonstrated positive lift over the baseline, with the strongest performers achieving up to 8.8% improvement in engagement breadth and 19.4% in engagement depth. We also observed substantial gains in steerability, with instruction following increasing from 59.2% to 84.8% and instruction violations decreasing from 26.6% to 5.8%. We detail the CharacterFlywheel process which integrates data curation, reward modeling to estimate and interpolate the landscape of engagement metrics, supervised fine-tuning (SFT), reinforcement learning (RL), and both offline and online evaluation to ensure reliable progress at each optimization step. We also discuss our methods for overfitting prevention and navigating production dynamics at scale. These contributions advance the scientific rigor and understanding of LLMs in social applications serving millions of users.
title_zh: CharacterFlywheel：在生产环境中实现可扩展的迭代优化，打造引人入胜且可操控的大型语言模型
abstract_zh:
本报告介绍了CharacterFlywheel，这是一个用于在Instagram、WhatsApp和Messenger等生产级社交聊天应用中持续优化大型语言模型（LLMs）的迭代飞轮流程。该流程始于LLaMA 3.1，通过结合内部与外部真实用户流量数据，历经15个模型版本的迭代优化。从2024年7月到2025年4月，我们通过为期7天的受控A/B测试持续部署新模型，结果显示用户参与度持续提升：在新部署的8个模型中，有7个相较基线模型实现了正向提升，表现最佳的模型在参与广度上最高提升了8.8%，在参与深度上最高提升了19.4%。同时，模型的可控性也显著增强，指令遵循率从59.2%提升至84.8%，指令违规率则从26.6%大幅下降至5.8%。

我们详细阐述了CharacterFlywheel流程，该流程融合了数据筛选、奖励建模（用于估算和插值参与度指标的分布格局）、监督微调（SFT）、强化学习（RL），以及离线与在线评估，确保在每个优化阶段都能实现可靠且可衡量的进步。此外，我们还探讨了防止过拟合的方法，以及在大规模生产环境中应对动态变化的策略。这些贡献显著提升了大型语言模型在服务数百万用户的社交应用中的科学严谨性与理解深度。

title: Co-Evolutionary Multi-Modal Alignment via Structured Adversarial Evolution
authors: Guoxin Shi, Haoyu Wang, Zaihui Yang, Yuxing Wang, Yongzhe Chang
abstract: Adversarial behavior plays a central role in aligning large language models with human values. However, existing alignment methods largely rely on static adversarial settings, which fundamentally limit robustness, particularly in multimodal settings with a larger attack surface. In this work, we move beyond static adversarial supervision and introduce co-evolutionary alignment with evolving attacks, instantiated by CEMMA (Co-Evolutionary Multi-Modal Alignment), an automated and adaptive framework for multimodal safety alignment. We introduce an Evolutionary Attacker that decomposes adversarial prompts into method templates and harmful intents. By employing genetic operators, including mutation, crossover, and differential evolution, it enables simple seed attacks to inherit the structural efficacy of sophisticated jailbreaks. The Adaptive Defender is iteratively updated on the synthesized hard negatives, forming a closed-loop process that adapts alignment to evolving attacks. Experiments show that the Evolutionary Attacker substantially increases red-teaming jailbreak attack success rate (ASR), while the Adaptive Defender improves robustness and generalization across benchmarks with higher data efficiency, without inducing excessive benign refusal, and remains compatible with inference-time defenses such as AdaShield.
title_zh: 通过结构化对抗进化的共进化多模态对齐
abstract_zh: 对抗性行为在将大型语言模型与人类价值观对齐的过程中起着核心作用。然而，现有的对齐方法大多依赖于静态的对抗性设置，这从根本上限制了模型的鲁棒性，尤其是在攻击面更大的多模态场景中。在本研究中，我们突破了静态对抗监督的局限，提出了一种基于动态演进攻击的共进化对齐方法，并通过 CEMMA（共进化多模态对齐）框架实现了这一理念。CEMMA 是一个自动化且自适应的多模态安全对齐框架。我们引入了进化攻击者（Evolutionary Attacker），它将对抗性提示分解为方法模板和有害意图两个部分。通过使用遗传算子（包括变异、交叉和差分进化），使简单的初始攻击能够继承复杂越狱攻击的结构优势。同时，自适应防御者（Adaptive Defender）在合成的困难负样本上进行迭代更新，形成一个闭环过程，使对齐能力能够动态适应不断演化的攻击。实验结果表明，进化攻击者显著提升了红队越狱攻击的成功率（ASR），而自适应防御者在多个基准测试中提升了模型的鲁棒性和泛化能力，同时具备更高的数据效率，且不会导致过度的良性拒绝行为，还与推理时的防御机制（如 AdaShield）保持兼容。

authors: Quanjun Zhang, Chunrong Fang, Yang Xie, Yuxiang Ma, Weisong Sun, Yun Yang, Zhenyu Chen
publish: ACM Transactions on Software Engineering and Methodology

title: GTR-SQL: Graph Pruning, Tournament Selection, and Taxonomy Repair for Text-to-SQL
authors: Jinrui Cheng, Shuai Huang, Kang Zhao
publish: 2025 5th International Conference on Communication Technology and Information Technology (ICCTIT)
abstract: Deploying Text-to-SQL in resource-constrained enterprise environments presents a dichotomy: proprietary Large Language Models (LLMs) pose privacy and cost concerns, while smaller open-source models often lack the reasoning depth for complex queries. To address this, we introduce GTR-SQL, a lightweight, training-free multi-agent framework designed to empower smaller models (e.g., 7B parameters) via orchestrated inference-time scaling. GTR-SQL targets specific failure modes through three components: (1) Graph-connected schema linking, which uses Steiner Tree approximation to guarantee topological connectivity for multi-hop joins; (2) Tournament-based selection, employing an execution-aware judge to filter subtle logical flaws; and (3) Repair-guided correction, utilizing a fine-grained error taxonomy to drive dual-path repairs rather than blind retries. Evaluations on the Spider and CSpider development sets (N=1034) demonstrate that GTR-SQL significantly augments the reasoning capabilities of lightweight models. Without fine-tuning, the framework delivers substantial gains in Execution Accuracy over direct prompting (+13.35% on Spider, +13.74% on CSpider) and maintains a Valid SQL rate exceeding 99%, proving its robustness for real-world applications.
title_zh: GTR-SQL：图剪枝、锦标赛选择与文本到SQL的分类修复
abstract_zh: 在资源受限的企业环境中部署文本转SQL（Text-to-SQL）技术面临两难困境：专有大型语言模型（LLMs）存在隐私和成本问题，而较小的开源模型通常缺乏处理复杂查询所需的推理深度。为解决这一问题，我们提出GTR-SQL——一种轻量级、无需训练的多智能体框架，通过协同推理时的扩展能力，赋能小型模型（如70亿参数规模）实现更强的性能。GTR-SQL针对特定的失败模式设计了三个核心组件：（1）基于图连接的模式链接，采用斯坦纳树近似算法，确保多跳连接在拓扑结构上的连通性；（2）基于锦标赛机制的选择策略，利用执行感知的评判模型识别细微的逻辑错误；（3）基于修复引导的纠错机制，借助细粒度错误分类体系，驱动双路径修复而非盲目重试。在Spider和CSpider开发集（N=1034）上的评估表明，GTR-SQL显著提升了轻量级模型的推理能力。在无需微调的情况下，该框架在直接提示（direct prompting）基础上实现了显著的执行准确率提升（Spider上+13.35%，CSpider上+13.74%），同时保持超过99%的有效SQL生成率，充分证明了其在真实应用场景中的鲁棒性与实用性。

title: An Automatic Knowledge Extraction Method for Penetration Testing Based on Transfer Learning
authors: Jie Liu, Bingjun He, Bingwen Wang, Haohan Ma
publish: 2025 8th International Conference on Algorithms, Computing and Artificial Intelligence (ACAI)
abstract: With the continuous evolution of cyberattack techniques, traditional penetration testing methods face challenges in efficiency and accuracy. To improve the automation level and knowledge extraction accuracy of penetration testing, this paper proposes an automated knowledge extraction method for penetration testing cases based on transfer learning. Transfer learning transfers knowledge from models trained in the source domain (such as CVE, MITRE ATT&CK) to the target domain (penetration testing blogs and reports, etc.), thus compensating for the lack of labeled data in the target domain. This improves the accuracy of the model in entity recognition and relation extraction tasks, even when structured samples are scarce in the target domain. In the experimental phase, the proposed transfer learning model is compared with baseline models (rule-based model and shallow machine learning model). The identified penetration testing-related entities and relations are used to complete the knowledge graph, thus achieving attack path coverage experiments. Experimental results show that the proposed transfer learning-based method has significant advantages in knowledge extraction tasks and can effectively improve the attack path coverage of the knowledge graph.
title_zh: 基于迁移学习的渗透测试自动知识提取方法
abstract_zh: 随着网络攻击技术的不断演进，传统渗透测试方法在效率和准确性方面面临挑战。为提升渗透测试的自动化水平与知识提取的准确性，本文提出一种基于迁移学习的渗透测试案例自动化知识提取方法。该方法将源域（如CVE、MITRE ATT&CK）中训练好的模型所蕴含的知识迁移至目标域（如渗透测试博客、报告等），从而弥补目标域标注数据不足的问题。该方法显著提升了模型在实体识别与关系抽取任务中的准确率，即使在目标域中结构化样本稀缺的情况下依然表现良好。实验阶段，所提出的迁移学习模型与基线模型（基于规则的模型和浅层机器学习模型）进行了对比。通过识别出的渗透测试相关实体与关系构建知识图谱，并开展攻击路径覆盖实验。实验结果表明，基于迁移学习的方法在知识提取任务中具有显著优势，能够有效提升知识图谱的攻击路径覆盖能力。

title: Enhanced Software Fault Prediction Using Machine Learning
authors: Piyush Bagla, Rohit Kumar, Kuldeep Kumar, K P Sharma, Bhumika Punetha, Radhika Malhotra
publish: 2025 OITS International Conference on Information Technology (OCIT)
abstract: Software fault prediction and proneness continue to be a pressing problem in the sphere of software business since this directly affects the quality of software products and reliability. The conventional techniques to determine software weaknesses rely on very basic knowledge or manual searching of modules that contain defects, and this is a time-consuming task and heavy workload. To address these issues, self-recovery models of software faults have risen to use the ML methodology to identify and recover software defects with more precision. This paper satirizes various software fault prediction models that positively use ML techniques to improve functionality of a system and minimize examples of faults. On these four datasets, we thoroughly analyze these models, which are evaluated with a ten-fold cross-validation and evaluated with respect to precision, recall, F1 measure, and accuracy. Findings The performance in terms of classification is at the highest level as the results show accuracy rates of <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$98,99 {\%}$</tex> (along with results of respective F1 scores) where Support Vector Machines (SVM), Naive Bayes (NB), Random Forest (RF) and K-Nearest Neighbor (KNN) algorithms are used. The results of this research highlights that there is a significant gain in the area of software fault prediction, which is also indicative of the effectiveness of ML tools in promoting predictive reliability and accuracy of systems.
title_zh: 基于机器学习的软件故障预测增强方法
abstract_zh: 软件故障预测与易错性问题在软件产业领域始终是一个紧迫的挑战，因为这直接影响到软件产品的质量和可靠性。传统的确定软件缺陷的方法依赖于非常基础的知识或手动查找包含缺陷的模块，这一过程耗时且工作量巨大。为解决这些问题，软件故障自恢复模型应运而生，采用机器学习（ML）方法更精准地识别并修复软件缺陷。本文批判性地分析了多种积极运用机器学习技术以提升系统功能并减少故障发生次数的软件故障预测模型。在四个数据集上，我们对这些模型进行了全面分析，采用十折交叉验证方法，并以精确率、召回率、F1值和准确率作为评估指标。研究结果表明，分类性能达到最高水平，准确率高达98.99%（同时附有相应的F1分数），所使用的算法包括支持向量机（SVM）、朴素贝叶斯（NB）、随机森林（RF）和K近邻（KNN）。本研究结果表明，机器学习在软件故障预测领域取得了显著进展，也充分体现了机器学习工具在提升系统预测可靠性与准确性方面的有效性。

title: Real-Time Cross-Project Software Fault Prediction using Transfer Learning, Online Learning and Auto ML
authors: Deepak Sharma, Pankaj Kumar, Praveen Kumar Rai
publish: 2025 Modern Electronics Devices and Intelligent Communication Systems (MEDCOM)
abstract: Significant financial losses and a decline in confidence in sectors including banking, healthcare, and self-driving cars are the results of serious issues brought on by software defects. RT-CPFP, a novel framework for real-time defect prediction in various applications, is presented in this paper. It integrates automated machine learning, internet learning, and transfer learning. By addressing the problems of limited data and shifting topic areas, TL facilitates knowledge sharing between source and target activities. OL lessens the chance of concept drift by regulating frequent code changes and updating the model in little steps. By automatically choosing features, models, and settings, AutoML simplifies the process and improves overall efficiency. Using the NASA and PROMISE datasets, RT-CPFP yielded an F1-score of 0. With an area under the curve (AUC) of 0, the score is 86. It outperforms the benchmarks by 812% with a score of 91 and a latency of less than 100 milliseconds. Working with continuous integration and continuous deployment (CI/CD) systems is made simple by the framework's architecture, which is depicted in a straightforward picture. Among the contributions are a robust and adaptable architecture, extensive testing using real-world data, and practical DevOps deployment strategies. Distribution inconsistencies, codebase modifications, and human adjustments are all handled by RTCPFP. In today's software development, it offers a fresh approach to address issues before they arise. Agile processes may make extensive use of this strategy.
title_zh: 基于迁移学习、在线学习与自动机器学习的实时跨项目软件缺陷预测
abstract_zh: 软件缺陷引发的严重问题导致银行、医疗和自动驾驶汽车等领域的重大财务损失以及信心下降。本文提出了一种名为RT-CPFP的新框架，用于在各类应用中实现实时缺陷预测。该框架融合了自动化机器学习（AutoML）、在线学习（OL）和迁移学习（TL）。迁移学习（TL）通过在源任务与目标任务之间共享知识，有效应对了数据量有限和主题领域变化的问题；在线学习（OL）通过控制频繁的代码变更并以小步更新模型，降低了概念漂移的风险；自动化机器学习（AutoML）则通过自动选择特征、模型和参数，简化了流程并提升了整体效率。在NASA和PROMISE数据集上的实验表明，RT-CPFP的F1分数达到0.86，AUC（曲线下面积）为0.91，相比基准方法性能提升高达812%，且延迟低于100毫秒。该框架的架构设计简洁明了，便于与持续集成/持续部署（CI/CD）系统无缝集成。本文的主要贡献包括：一个稳健且灵活的架构设计、基于真实世界数据的全面测试，以及实用的DevOps部署策略。RT-CPFP能够有效应对数据分布不一致、代码库变更以及人为调整等挑战。在当今的软件开发中，该方法为提前识别和解决潜在问题提供了全新的思路，尤其适用于广泛采用敏捷开发流程的场景。

title: Power-Area Efficient Hardware Architecture Design of 2D FIR Filter using CSD
authors: Venkata Krishna Odugu, Sireesha Pendem, Harish Babu Gade, Merina Jaladi
publish: 2025 IEEE 2nd International Conference for Women in Computing (InCoWoCo)
abstract: This paper details the design of a hardware architecture for a Two-Dimensional Finite Impulse Response (2D FIR) filter, optimized for efficiency in power, area, and delay for image processing tasks. The multiplier module, which is typically a component in such filters that is both resource-intensive and complex, has been replaced by a structure that is efficient and does not require a multiplier. In order to perform arithmetic operations, this proposed architecture is solely dependent on adders/subtractors, and shifters. The adoption of Canonical Signed Digit (CSD) encoding for the filter coefficients is the most important aspect of this multiplierless approach. This representation reduces the amount of bits that are non-zero in comparison to a normal binary format. This reduction in the number of non-zero bits directly correlates to a hardware implementation that is sparser and requires fewer operators to add. Because of this, architecture is able to accomplish significant improvements in terms of both space and power efficiency. The design process involved generating filter coefficients with specific characteristics using MATLAB, and the coefficients are converted into CSD by the dedicated hardware in this work, followed by hardware implementation using Verilog HDL. Finally, the design was synthesized for a 45nm ASIC CMOS technology using Cadence tools and also using Xilinx Vivado tools to produce and analyze its real-world area, power, and delay metrics.
title_zh: 基于CSD的二维FIR滤波器高效功耗-面积硬件架构设计
abstract_zh: 本文详细介绍了用于二维有限冲激响应（2D FIR）滤波器的硬件架构设计，该设计在图像处理任务中针对功耗、面积和延迟进行了优化。传统滤波器中通常资源消耗大且结构复杂的乘法器模块，已被一种无需乘法器的高效结构所取代。该提出的架构仅依赖加法器/减法器和移位器来完成算术运算，从而实现了无乘法器的设计。该方法的核心在于采用规范符号数字（CSD）编码表示滤波器系数。与普通二进制格式相比，CSD编码显著减少了非零位的数量。非零位数的减少直接导致硬件实现更加稀疏，所需加法操作器也更少。因此，该架构在面积和功耗效率方面均取得了显著提升。设计过程中，首先利用MATLAB生成具有特定特性的滤波器系数，随后在本研究中专门设计的硬件模块中将这些系数转换为CSD格式，最后采用Verilog HDL完成硬件实现。最终，该设计使用Cadence工具在45nm ASIC CMOS工艺下进行综合，并通过Xilinx Vivado工具进行实现与分析，以获取其在实际应用中的面积、功耗和延迟等关键指标。

title: Real-Time LLM-MCP-Based Fault Detection Framework for Two-Wheeled Self-Balancing Robot
authors: Pooya Zeynali, Mahmood Seyyedzadeh, Amir A. Ghavifekr, Alireza Tajdid, Ali Alfayly
publish: 2025 International Conference on Modeling, Simulation &amp; Intelligent Computing (MoSICom)
abstract: Two-wheeled self-balancing robots (TWSBRs) are widely used as benchmarks in control research but remain vulnerable to diverse mechanical, electrical, and sensor faults. This paper introduces a real-time fault detection framework that integrates a Large Language Model (LLM) with the Model Context Protocol (MCP). Unlike approaches that rely on static datasets or textualized sensor signals, the proposed method enables the LLM to query live numerical data, datasheets, and diagnostic logs through MCP's client-server architecture. Acting as an “AI Robot Maintenance Engineer,” the LLM dynamically selects relevant sensor inputs, reasons over evidence using chain-of-thought prompting, and executes corrective actions without retraining when new tools are added. Experiments on a simulated TWSBR with fifteen predefined fault types achieved an overall diagnostic accuracy of 92.72%, with several categories reaching 100%. The results demonstrate that combining LLM reasoning with MCP's flexible architecture provides a scalable and effective solution for robotic fault detection, offering strong potential for real-world deployment.
title_zh: 基于实时大模型-通信协议（LLM-MCP）的两轮自平衡机器人故障检测框架
abstract_zh: 双轮自平衡机器人（TWSBRs）在控制研究中被广泛用作基准测试平台，但仍然容易受到各种机械、电气和传感器故障的影响。本文提出了一种实时故障检测框架，该框架将大型语言模型（LLM）与模型上下文协议（MCP）相结合。与依赖静态数据集或文本化传感器信号的方法不同，所提出的方法通过MCP的客户端-服务器架构，使LLM能够实时查询数值数据、数据手册和诊断日志。作为“AI机器人维修工程师”，LLM能够动态选择相关传感器输入，利用思维链提示对证据进行推理，并在新增工具时无需重新训练即可执行纠正措施。在包含十五种预设故障类型的模拟TWSBR上进行的实验表明，整体诊断准确率达到92.72%，部分故障类别甚至达到100%。结果表明，将LLM的推理能力与MCP灵活的架构相结合，为机器人故障检测提供了一种可扩展且高效解决方案，具有很强的实际应用潜力。

title: UniOrch: A Unified Mixed Framework for High-Efficiency LLM Training on Heterogeneous AI Chips_supp1-3668647.docx
authors: Jingyi Wang
abstract: Efficient coordination of heterogeneous AI chips (GPU/NPU/DCU) in data centers is crucial for Large Language Model (LLM) training, but this process is hindered by architectural mismatches, protocol fragmentation, and network partitioning. Existing solutions fail to achieve unified resource management across different chips, resulting in severe resource fragmentation and reduced allreduce efficiency. To overcome these limitations, this paper proposes the unified coordination framework UniOrch, which not only integrates three core functionalities, including hardware abstraction, software standardization, and communication coordination, but also enables the training and inference of large models across heterogeneous AI chips. UniOrch's hardware-agnostic bare-metal cloud eliminates virtualization overhead through Border Gateway Protocol Ethernet Virtual Private Network (BGP EVPN) overlay networks and gateway-based chip integration; its PyTorch-based adaptation layer masks hardware differences and reduces migration costs; the Transformer Collective Communication Library (TCCL) unifies NCCL, HCCL, and OpenMPIprotocols to support seamless hybrid parallel training. Furthermore, the framework ' score scheduling mechanism is the Heterogeneous Hybrid Estimation Model (HHEM), which employs a two stage cost model combining static analysis with dynamic runtime feedback to dynamically allocate computing power based on Transformer task loads, ensuring cross-chip task synchronization, resource pooling, and dynamic allocation. Deployment verification in real-world production environments (e.g., China Construction Bank) shows that UniOrch achieves significant improvements: resource utilization of heterogeneous AI infrastructure is increased by 35%, cross-chip latency is reduced by 42%, accuracy loss in heterogeneous environments is <0.8%.
title_zh: UniOrch：一种用于异构AI芯片上高效大模型训练的统一混合框架_supp1-3668647.docx
abstract_zh: 在数据中心中高效协调异构AI芯片（GPU/NPU/DCU）对于大语言模型（LLM）训练至关重要，但这一过程受到架构不匹配、协议碎片化以及网络分区等问题的制约。现有解决方案难以实现跨不同芯片的统一资源管理，导致严重的资源碎片化和AllReduce效率下降。为克服这些局限，本文提出统一协调框架UniOrch，不仅集成了硬件抽象、软件标准化和通信协调三大核心功能，还支持在异构AI芯片上进行大规模模型的训练与推理。UniOrch通过基于边界网关协议以太网虚拟私有网络（BGP EVPN）的Overlay网络和网关式芯片集成，实现了与硬件无关的裸金属云架构，消除了虚拟化开销；其基于PyTorch的适配层屏蔽了硬件差异，显著降低了迁移成本；Transformer集体通信库（TCCL）统一了NCCL、HCCL和OpenMPI协议，支持无缝的混合并行训练。此外，框架采用“评分调度机制”，即异构混合估计模型（HHEM），该模型结合静态分析与动态运行时反馈的两阶段成本模型，根据Transformer任务负载动态分配计算资源，确保跨芯片任务同步、资源池化与动态调度。在真实生产环境（如中国建设银行）中的部署验证表明，UniOrch取得了显著成效：异构AI基础设施的资源利用率提升35%，跨芯片延迟降低42%，异构环境下的精度损失低于0.8%。

title: An Automated Reinforcement Learning Reward Design Framework With Large Language Model for Cooperative Platoon Coordination_supp1-3664858.pdf
authors: Peng Yi
abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has demonstrated excellent decision-making potential in platoon coordination problems. However, due to the variability of coordination goals, the complexity of the decision problem, and the time-consumption of trial-and-error in manual design, finding a well performance reward function to guide RL training to solve complex platoon coordination problems remains challenging. In this paper, we formally define the Platoon Coordination Reward Design Problem (PCRDP), extending the RL-based cooperative platoon coordination problem to incorporate automated reward function generation. To address PCRDP, we propose a Large Language Model (LLM)-based Platoon coordination Reward Design (PCRD) framework, which systematically automates reward function discovery through LLM-driven initialization and iterative optimization. In this method, LLM first initializes reward functions based on environment code and task requirements with an Analysis and Initial Reward (AIR) module, and then iteratively optimizes them based on training feedback with an evolutionary module. The AIR module guides LLM to deepen their understanding of code and tasks through a chain of thought, effectively mitigating hallucination risks in code generation. The evolutionary module fine-tunes and reconstructs the reward function, achieving a balance between exploration diversity and convergence stability for training. To validate our approach, we establish six challenging coordination scenarios with varying complexity levels within the Yangtze River Delta transportation network simulation. Comparative experimental results demonstrate that RL agents utilizing PCRD-generated reward functions consistently outperform human-engineered reward functions, achieving an average of 10% higher performance metrics in all scenarios.
title_zh: 一种基于大语言模型的自动化强化学习奖励设计框架用于合作车队协同_supp1-3664858.pdf
abstract_zh: 强化学习（RL）在车队协同控制问题中展现了卓越的决策潜力。然而，由于协同目标的多样性、决策问题的复杂性，以及人工设计过程中试错过程耗时耗力，设计出能够有效引导RL训练以解决复杂车队协同问题的高性能奖励函数仍面临巨大挑战。本文正式定义了车队协同奖励函数设计问题（Platoon Coordination Reward Design Problem, PCRDP），将基于强化学习的协同车队控制问题扩展为包含自动化奖励函数生成的新范式。为解决PCRDP，我们提出了一种基于大语言模型（LLM）的车队协同奖励设计（Platoon Coordination Reward Design, PCRD）框架，通过LLM驱动的初始化与迭代优化，系统性地实现奖励函数的自动化发现。在该方法中，LLM首先通过“分析与初始奖励”（Analysis and Initial Reward, AIR）模块，基于环境代码和任务需求初始化奖励函数；随后，利用进化模块根据训练反馈对奖励函数进行迭代优化。AIR模块通过思维链（chain-of-thought）引导LLM深入理解代码与任务，有效降低了代码生成过程中的幻觉风险。进化模块则对奖励函数进行精细化调优与重构，在训练过程中的探索多样性与收敛稳定性之间取得良好平衡。为验证所提方法的有效性，我们在长江三角洲交通网络仿真环境中构建了六个复杂度各异的挑战性协同场景。对比实验结果表明，采用PCRD生成的奖励函数的RL智能体在所有场景中均显著优于人工设计的奖励函数，平均性能指标提升达10%。

title: An Autonomous Agentic Framework for Interactive Code Mentoring and Error Resolution using Large Language Models
authors: Seetaram Rao Rayarao, Nilesh Dnyaneshwar Bhandarwar, Rahul Dattangire, Sudhakar Vuriti
publish: 2025 Modern Electronics Devices and Intelligent Communication Systems (MEDCOM)
abstract: Revolutionary advances in large language models have ushered in the age of intelligent agents. The development of artificial general intelligence may hinge on Large Language Model (LLM) agents, which are capable of goal-driven behavior and dynamic adaptability. The purpose of this study is to bridge this gap with an autonomous Agentic framework for interactive code mentoring and bug fixing powered by LLMs, specifically GPT-4o-mini and built on the MERN stack. The software platform enables authenticated users to pose code-specific issues in a structured, prompt-response manner and receive an intelligent response, while logging all their interactions, including prompt content, response time, and token utilization. During testing, the system processed over 150 user prompts, with 71% of responses categorized as slow (above 1000 ms), 29% moderate (500-1000 ms), and none classified as fast (below 500 ms). Token analysis showed an average usage of 480 total tokens per prompt, with notable spikes at prompts #3 and #5. The platform comes equipped with a simple user interface, history management of sorts, and an admin tool to visualize data captured at the prompt level. The Agentic framework and development may not only assist individual learning but may produce organized information to analyze their beliefs and morals.
title_zh: 基于大型语言模型的自主代理框架：用于交互式代码辅导与错误修复
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型的革命性进展开启了智能代理的新时代。人工通用智能的发展可能取决于大型语言模型（LLM）代理，这类代理具备目标驱动行为和动态适应能力。本研究旨在通过一个由LLM驱动的自主代理框架，弥合这一技术鸿沟，实现基于GPT-4o-mini的交互式代码辅导与缺陷修复，系统构建于MERN技术栈之上。该软件平台允许经过身份验证的用户以结构化提示-响应方式提出具体的代码问题，并获得智能回复，同时记录所有交互信息，包括提示内容、响应时间及令牌使用情况。在测试过程中，系统处理了超过150个用户提示，其中71%的响应被归类为慢速（超过1000毫秒），29%为中等速度（500至1000毫秒），无任何响应被归类为快速（低于500毫秒）。令牌分析显示，每个提示平均使用480个令牌，提示编号#3和#5出现显著的令牌使用峰值。该平台配备简洁的用户界面，具备一定的历史记录管理功能，并提供管理员工具，用于可视化分析提示层面采集的数据。该代理框架及其开发不仅有助于个体学习，还可能生成结构化信息，用于分析用户的学习信念与道德观念。

title: User Requirement Understanding Based on Large Language Models for Large Constellations
authors: Peiyun Li, Zhanpeng Xu, Xiaohan Sun, Xi Cai, Song Xie, Linghui Yu
publish: 2025 8th International Conference on Algorithms, Computing and Artificial Intelligence (ACAI)
abstract: With the widespread application of large constellations in the remote sensing field, traditional manual parsing of user requirements has become inadequate to meet the demands of massive and time-sensitive task scheduling. This paper proposes a user requirement parsing method based on large language models. By constructing a tree-like decomposition structure between user natural language requirements and formatted input for task planning, the method achieves precise extraction of requirement elements. To address the issue of sample insufficiency, an innovative reverse synthesis strategy is designed to generate natural language requirements from formatted outputs. Through training, the model's response accuracy is enhanced. Experimental results show that the method achieves over 90% accuracy in key elements such as target location, payload requirements, priority levels, and time allocation, validating the effectiveness of large language models in parsing user requirements for remote sensing constellations.
title_zh: 基于大语言模型的大型星座用户需求理解
abstract_zh: 随着大规模星群在遥感领域的广泛应用，传统的手工解析用户需求已难以满足海量且具有时效性要求的任务调度需求。本文提出了一种基于大语言模型的用户需求解析方法。通过构建用户自然语言需求与任务规划格式化输入之间的树状分解结构，该方法实现了对需求要素的精准提取。为解决样本不足的问题，设计了一种创新的逆向合成策略，能够从格式化输出中生成自然语言需求，从而扩充训练数据。经过训练，模型的响应准确率显著提升。实验结果表明，该方法在目标位置、载荷要求、优先级水平和时间分配等关键要素上的解析准确率均超过90%，验证了大语言模型在解析遥感星群用户需求方面的有效性。

title: RegCheck-Hybrid: A Hybrid Rule-LLM Framework for Automated Multi-modal Fire Code Compliance Checking
authors: Zirui Chen, Wei Zhou
publish: 2025 International Conference on Mechatronic Engineering and Artificial Intelligence (MEAI)
abstract: With the increasing complexity of building designs, fire code compliance checking faces challenges such as numerous regulations, frequent updates, and low efficiency of manual audits. Existing automated methods are polarized: traditional rule-based methods struggle with unstructured text and high maintenance costs, while Large Language Model (LLM) based methods suffer from hallucination risks in numerical reasoning. This paper proposes RegCheck-Hybrid, a hybrid framework. It first constructs a high-precision domain knowledge base through “Regulation as Code” governance and multi-modal parsing. Secondly, it designs a “Rule-First, LLM-Fallback” hybrid judgment engine, combining the determinism of symbolic logic with the flexibility of neural networks. Experiments on a real-world fire audit dataset show that the system achieves an F1-score of $89 \%$, significantly outperforming single RAG systems or traditional rule engines, especially in scenarios involving tables and complex logic clauses.
title_zh: RegCheck-Hybrid：一种用于自动化多模态消防规范合规性检查的混合规则-大语言模型框架
abstract_zh: 随着建筑方案设计日益复杂，消防规范合规性检查面临诸多挑战，如规范条文繁多、更新频繁以及人工审核效率低下等问题。现有的自动化方法呈现两极分化：传统基于规则的方法难以处理非结构化文本，且维护成本高；而基于大语言模型（LLM）的方法在数值推理任务中又存在幻觉风险。本文提出一种混合框架——RegCheck-Hybrid。该框架首先通过“规范即代码”治理模式与多模态解析技术，构建高精度领域知识库；其次设计了“规则优先、LLM兜底”的混合判断引擎，融合符号逻辑的确定性与神经网络的灵活性。在真实世界消防审计数据集上的实验表明，该系统F1得分达到89%，显著优于单一RAG系统或传统规则引擎，尤其在涉及表格数据和复杂逻辑条款的场景中表现突出。

title: Empirical Evaluation of AI-Assisted Risk Reasoning for ICPS Software Security
authors: Padma Iyenghar
publish: IEEE Transactions on Industrial Cyber-Physical Systems
abstract: Operational Technology (OT) systems form the control and actuation layer of Industrial Cyber-Physical Systems (ICPS), linking computational intelligence with physical processes. Typical OT components (e.g., PLCs) with embedded dedicated control software operate in safety-critical environments where software reliability and cybersecurity are essential for overall system trustworthiness. However, existing OT security resources emphasize taxonomies and threat catalogs rather than reproducible benchmarks for empirical risk reasoning, particularly in evaluating Artificial Intelligence (AI)-assisted methods for cybersecurity risk assessment. In this context, this study introduces a reproducible, standards-aligned benchmark designed to evaluate AI-assisted risk reasoning in OT software within ICPS environments. This paper presents two main contributions toward advancing trustworthy and reliable ICPS. The first is the design of EmbSoftOTBench, a standards-aligned benchmark dataset for ICPS software risk reasoning that operationalizes IEC 62443-3-2 through machine-readable scenarios derived from MITRE EMB3D Embedded Systems Threat Matrix (EMB3D). The benchmark provides paired threat and benign scenarios with quantitative factors and expert rationales, enabling structured and reproducible evaluation of AI-assisted security reasoning within ICPS engineering workflows. The second contribution is an experimental evaluation of state-of-the-art Large Language Models (LLMs) employing the benchmark dataset. Results reveal systematic trade-offs between sensitivity, specificity, and calibration, establishing first baselines for AI-empowered ICPS software risk reasoning. The dataset is publicly released under the CC BY 4.0 license to support reproducible research, engineering practice, and education in safety-critical ICPS environments.
title_zh: AI辅助风险推理在ICPS软件安全中的实证评估
abstract_zh: 工业控制技术（OT）系统构成了工业网络物理系统（ICPS）的控制与执行层，将计算智能与物理过程相连接。典型的OT组件（如可编程逻辑控制器PLC）嵌入专用控制软件，在安全关键环境中运行，软件的可靠性与网络安全对于整个系统的可信性至关重要。然而，现有的OT安全资源多侧重于分类体系和威胁目录，缺乏可复现的基准测试工具，尤其在评估人工智能（AI）辅助方法在网络安全风险评估中的应用方面存在明显不足。在此背景下，本研究提出了一种可复现、符合标准的基准测试框架，旨在评估AI辅助的OT软件在ICPS环境中的风险推理能力。本文主要贡献如下：第一，设计了EmbSoftOTBench，一个符合标准的ICPS软件风险推理基准数据集。该数据集通过从MITRE EMB3D嵌入式系统威胁矩阵（EMB3D）中提取可机器读取的场景，将IEC 62443-3-2标准具体化，提供成对的威胁场景与良性场景，包含量化指标与专家推理依据，支持在ICPS工程流程中对AI辅助安全推理进行结构化、可复现的评估。第二，基于该基准数据集，对当前最先进的大型语言模型（LLMs）进行了实验评估。结果揭示了模型在敏感性、特异性与校准性之间存在系统性权衡，为AI赋能的ICPS软件风险推理建立了首个基准参考。该数据集已根据CC BY 4.0许可协议公开发布，旨在支持安全关键型ICPS环境中可复现的研究、工程实践与教育工作。

title: Phase-I: Implementation of an FPGA-Enabled IoT Framework for Real-Time Wildfire Detection
authors: S.Dhivya, Kashish U, Jayasre S, Gorrela Pavani Mani Swathi
publish: 2025 Modern Electronics Devices and Intelligent Communication Systems (MEDCOM)
abstract: Climate change, drought and human error are rising the frequency of wild fires. This will start early fire detection through timely identification of sources of ignition to save both the environment and the economy. The present paper presents the Phase-1 development of the Internet of Things (IoT) platform of wildfire detection based on field-programmable gate array (FPGA) hardware. This system was developed and based on a Nexys A7 FPGA development board containing a Xilinx Artix-7 FPGA, connected to an infrared (IR) flame sensor and built-in XADC temperature sensor. The IR flame sensor is sensitive to the presence of flames based on the infrared radiation nature, whereas the XADC provides temperature sensing digital binary numbers. Vivado 2021.2 RTL software was used with the Verilog hardware description language (HDL) to develop and implement the working design. The Hardware was proven and presented as having with the Nexys A7 the FPGA the capability to identify fire events in real-time with minimal latency and consistent temperature sensors. To identify the starting conditions of fire multi-parameter, a DHT11 temperature-humidity sensor will be installed shortly. The findings here demonstrate that FPGA edge processing can be used as an alternative to standalone microcontroller embedded pre-processing system in wildfire detection since it is more efficient and consumes less power.
title_zh: 第一阶段：基于FPGA的物联网框架在实时野火检测中的实现
abstract_zh: 气候变化、干旱以及人为失误正导致野火发生频率不断上升。为应对这一问题，亟需通过及时识别起火源实现早期火灾探测，以保护环境并减少经济损失。本文介绍了基于现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）硬件的物联网（IoT）野火检测平台的第1阶段开发工作。该系统基于Nexys A7 FPGA开发板构建，其核心为Xilinx Artix-7 FPGA芯片，连接了红外（IR）火焰传感器和内置的XADC温度传感器。红外火焰传感器通过检测火焰发出的红外辐射来判断火情，而XADC则提供数字化的温度测量值。系统设计采用Vivado 2021.2 RTL软件平台，使用Verilog硬件描述语言（HDL）完成开发与实现。实验结果表明，基于Nexys A7 FPGA的硬件平台具备实时识别火灾事件的能力，具有极低延迟和稳定的温度传感性能。为进一步实现多参数火灾起始条件判断，后续将加装DHT11温湿度传感器。研究结果表明，FPGA边缘计算处理可作为独立微控制器嵌入式预处理系统的有效替代方案，其在野火检测中表现出更高的效率和更低的功耗。

title: Random Forest Assisted Floorplanning Optimization in VLSI Design
authors: Vikram G S, Arun Kumar K, Navaneethan S, Venkatasubramaniam R
publish: 2025 Modern Electronics Devices and Intelligent Communication Systems (MEDCOM)
abstract: Floorplanning is an essential step in the Very Large-Scale Integration (VLSI) physical design flow that has serious implications in terms of area usage, wirelength, power consumption, and timing closure. Typical heuristic techniques such as simulated annealing and genetic algorithms yield satisfactory solutions but are marked by excessive computation cost. In this case, a machine learning framework based on the Random Forest (RF) algorithm is used to estimate the quality of candidate floorplans. The framework discerns features such as block sizes, aspect ratios, and netlist connectivity, and uses Random Forest regression to predict parameters such as delay, congestion, and timing slack. On benchmark circuits, experimental results demonstrate that the proposed technique reduces the search space by at most 40%, improves runtime efficiency by approximately 25%, and achieves a maximum of 12% wirelength savings compared with traditional heuristic methods. This research indicates the potential for integrating machine learning models into electronic design automation (EDA) systems for accelerating design closure.
title_zh: 基于随机森林的VLSI设计中布图规划优化
abstract_zh: 布局规划是超大规模集成电路（VLSI）物理设计流程中的关键步骤，对面积利用、布线长度、功耗以及时序收敛具有重要影响。传统的启发式方法，如模拟退火和遗传算法，虽然能够获得较为满意的解决方案，但往往伴随着过高的计算开销。为此，本文提出一种基于随机森林（Random Forest, RF）算法的机器学习框架，用于评估候选布局方案的质量。该框架能够提取诸如模块尺寸、长宽比和网表连接性等特征，并利用随机森林回归模型预测延迟、拥塞程度和时序余量等关键参数。在标准测试电路上的实验结果表明，所提出的方法最多可将搜索空间缩小40%，运行效率提升约25%，与传统启发式方法相比，布线长度最多可减少12%。本研究展示了将机器学习模型融入电子设计自动化（EDA）系统以加速设计收敛的巨大潜力。

title: RISC-V Based Modular ALU Framework: Simulation of Complete ISA and FPGA-Based ALU Operation Implementation
authors: Venu Gopala Krishna Davala, Manikanta Reddy Medagam, Shyamosree Goswami, Anup Dandapat
publish: 2025 IEEE 2nd International Conference for Women in Computing (InCoWoCo)
abstract: In this paper, we present the process of designing, simulating, and implementing a 32-bit single-cycle RISC-V processor with ALU custom operation logic using Zynq-7000 XC7Z020CLG484-1 FPGA. We designed the processor to support a typical instruction set with R-type, I-type, S-type, and B-type operation instructions and to use custom ALU operations: NAND, NOR, XOR, AND, OR, addition, subtraction, and multiplication. The model is provided in Verilog HDL, and the design was developed using Xilinx Vivado 2019.2. The ALU output and the debug state of the Program Counter (PC) output were connected to the ZC702 board LEDs, which enabled viewing processor activity in real-time. The project was validated using functional simulation with GTKWave, along with hardware debugging with the FPGA, ensuring correctness. This work provided an excellent example of extending RISC-V modularity and an end-to-end project of a single-cycle processor and a foundation for custom processor designs and educational projects.
title_zh: 基于RISC-V的模块化ALU框架：完整指令集架构的仿真与基于FPGA的ALU操作实现
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了基于Zynq-7000 XC7Z020CLG484-1 FPGA设计、仿真与实现32位单周期RISC-V处理器的过程，该处理器集成了自定义ALU运算逻辑。我们设计的处理器支持典型的指令集，包括R型、I型、S型和B型操作指令，并实现了自定义的ALU运算功能，如NAND、NOR、XOR、AND、OR、加法、减法和乘法。整个模型采用Verilog HDL编写，设计开发环境为Xilinx Vivado 2019.2。ALU输出及程序计数器（PC）的调试状态通过连接至ZC702开发板的LED灯，实现了处理器运行状态的实时可视化。项目通过GTKWave进行功能仿真验证，并结合FPGA硬件调试，确保了设计的正确性。本工作为扩展RISC-V的模块化特性提供了一个优秀范例，完整呈现了单周期处理器从设计到实现的端到端流程，为自定义处理器设计及教学项目奠定了坚实基础。

title: Real-Time Collaborative Programming: An Approach to Improving Productivity and Code Reliability
authors: Sandhya Umrao, Upendra Dwivedi, Sanjay Kumar, Bhawna Singh
publish: 2025 Modern Electronics Devices and Intelligent Communication Systems (MEDCOM)
abstract: The Internet is growing rapidly, and many desktop apps are already being developed for online use. With the Internet, many apps are easily accessible anytime, anywhere. The Cloud Editor is one of the tools developers need to design their applications. The Joint Real-Time Cloud Editor also allows multiple users to edit the same document that replaces traditional document laying and document techniques. However, developing joint web applications is a time-consuming and complex effort, as document synchronization and implementation of competitive solution services is required. The purpose of this application is to use web socket technology to create and develop real-time code editor applications that will make it easier for users to collaborate with and collaborate when working on a project. Users of this program can collaborate in real time on projects. Cloud Editor is a web application that provides a workspace for creating, running and interacting with other users in real time above the terminal. The proposed system discuss a cloud-based real-time collaborative code editor designed to support synchronous multi-user programming. Unlike conventional desktop IDEs, the solution adopts a distributed, event-driven architecture using WebRTC, Socket.io, Node.js, and React.js. The primary contribution of this work lies in the complete design and technical implementation of a real-time collaborative programming environment using WebRTC, Socket.io, Node.js, and React.js. The proposed architecture and synchronization strategy provide a foundation for future empirical studies and performance analysis.
title_zh: 实时协作编程：提升生产力与代码可靠性的方法
abstract_zh: 互联网正迅速发展，许多桌面应用程序已开始转向在线使用。借助互联网，各类应用可随时随地轻松访问。云编辑器是开发者设计应用程序所需的重要工具之一。联合实时云编辑器还支持多名用户同时编辑同一文档，取代了传统的文档排版与协作方式。然而，开发联合式网络应用是一项耗时且复杂的工作，因为需要实现文档同步以及竞争解决方案服务。本应用旨在利用WebSocket技术创建并开发实时代码编辑器应用，使用户在项目协作时更加便捷高效。该程序的用户能够实时协同完成项目工作。云编辑器是一款基于网页的应用程序，提供一个工作空间，用户可在终端上实时创建、运行代码，并与其他用户进行互动。本文提出的系统讨论了一种基于云的实时协同代码编辑器，旨在支持同步多用户编程。与传统的桌面集成开发环境（IDE）不同，该解决方案采用基于WebRTC、Socket.io、Node.js和React.js的分布式、事件驱动架构。本研究的主要贡献在于完整设计并技术实现了一个基于WebRTC、Socket.io、Node.js和React.js的实时协同编程环境。所提出的架构与同步策略为未来实证研究和性能分析奠定了基础。

title: A Review of Bandwidth Enhancement Techniques for Die-to-Die Single-Ended Interfaces in Chiplets
authors: Haitao You, Yixiang Cheng, Li Zhang, Xiaofang Gao, Xinyu Wu, Tianyi Zhang, Shizeng Zhang, Dimitar Nikolov, Qiang Cui, Juin J. Liou
abstract: With the rapid development of artificial intelligence (AI) and high-performance computing (HPC), the demand for computational power is increasing exponentially. Traditional single-chip architectures can no longer meet the growing computational power requirements. The Chiplet architecture has emerged as one effective solution. However, this architecture faces several critical challenges. In particular, die-to-die (D2D) interface bandwidth is a critical bottleneck impacting the performance of the entire Chiplet architecture. This paper systematically summarizes and compares existing technologies aimed at enhancing the bandwidth of D2D single-ended interfaces, including signal modulation, and interface circuits for functional blocks such as drivers, continuous-time linear equalizers (CTLE), and decision feedback equalizers (DFE). This paper also provides valuable insights and guidance for selecting optimal signal modulation schemes and interface circuit architectures. Finally, forward-looking directions are proposed for bandwidth enhancement, such as co-design and the development of new electronic design automation (EDA) tools, to meet the rapidly growing demand for computational power.
title_zh: 芯粒中面向晶粒对晶粒单端接口的带宽增强技术综述
abstract_zh: 随着人工智能（AI）和高性能计算（HPC）的快速发展，对计算能力的需求呈指数级增长。传统的单芯片架构已无法满足日益增长的计算需求，芯片小芯片（Chiplet）架构应运而生，成为一种有效的解决方案。然而，该架构仍面临诸多关键挑战，其中芯片到芯片（Die-to-Die, D2D）接口带宽是制约整个Chiplet架构性能的核心瓶颈。本文系统地总结并对比了现有提升D2D单端接口带宽的技术，包括信号调制技术，以及驱动器、连续时间线性均衡器（CTLE）和判决反馈均衡器（DFE）等功能模块的接口电路设计。本文还为选择最优的信号调制方案和接口电路架构提供了有价值的见解与指导。最后，针对带宽提升的未来发展方向，提出了协同设计以及新型电子设计自动化（EDA）工具开发等前瞻性建议，以应对计算能力需求的持续快速增长。

title: Sustainable Mobile Apps Development to Optimize Performance through Power Management and Battery Consumption
authors: B.P. Joshi, Venkata Suresh Babu Chilluri, Shweta Goyal
publish: 2025 Modern Electronics Devices and Intelligent Communication Systems (MEDCOM)
abstract: As they continue to develop and add new features, modern smartphones have become essential for a large number of individuals worldwide. Yet, the speed at which smartphones have developed in recent years has outpaced battery capacity, resulting in rapid battery drain and the necessity for customers substitute and dispose them regularly. The main cause of these incredibly low rates is programmers' unfamiliarity with the tools, processes, software, and systems needed to analyse this important performance parameter. The necessity for increased understanding and integration of energy-efficient practices in application development is underscored by this knowledge gap. By using AI algorithms to forecast battery usage and optimise smartphone energy use, this work tackles this difficulty. An integrated tool in Android Studio, the Android profiler is intended to track application performance, including power consumption monitoring. More precise measurements at the system or code level are frequently made possible by software-based approaches. Metrics that gauge the software's energy usage are necessary for the creation of energy-efficient software. Within five minutes of doing the initial test, Apptim provides the performance findings. In summary, this study examined how much energy an Android application uses. Measurements of CPU, memory, and energy consumption were collected and examined from the test runs. To learn more about Android developers' perspectives on power consumption control, we intend to survey them in future work. Additionally, we intend to provide automated methods to assist developers in identifying, locating, and resolving issues related to power use. In addition, we wish to integrate issue tracker data to analyse power consumption commitments and contrast energy commits to other commit classes.
title_zh: 通过电源管理和电池消耗优化性能的可持续移动应用开发
abstract_zh: 随着现代智能手机不断开发并增加新功能，它们已成为全球大量人群不可或缺的工具。然而，近年来智能手机的发展速度已远远超过电池容量的提升，导致电池耗电过快，用户不得不频繁更换和处置设备。造成这种极低续航效率的主要原因在于，开发者对分析这一关键性能参数所需的工具、流程、软件和系统缺乏了解。这一知识空白凸显了在应用开发中加强能源效率实践的理解与整合的迫切需求。本文通过利用人工智能算法预测电池使用情况并优化智能手机的能源消耗，来应对这一挑战。Android Studio中的集成工具——Android性能分析器，旨在追踪应用性能，包括功耗监控。软件层面的方法通常能够实现更精确的系统或代码级测量。为了开发节能型软件，需要有能够衡量软件能耗的指标。Apptim工具在初始测试后五分钟内即可提供性能分析结果。综上所述，本研究探讨了Android应用的能耗情况，从测试运行中收集并分析了CPU、内存和能耗数据。未来的工作中，我们计划对Android开发者进行调查，以深入了解他们对功耗控制的看法。此外，我们还计划提供自动化方法，帮助开发者识别、定位并解决与能耗相关的问题。同时，我们希望整合问题追踪系统数据，分析功耗相关的提交记录，并将能耗提交与其他类型的提交进行对比。
